'''Bompreil''' was located within the [[Demetras sector/Legends|Demetras sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], in the [[Bompreil system/Legends|Bompreil system]].

==History==
Bompreil was the site of a [[Battle of Bompreil|battle]] during the early [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Imperial forces, including the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Daric LaRone]], destroyed an Alliance resistance cell in an operation that resulted in many civilian [[Death/Legends|casualties]].<ref name="Allegiance" />

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
